title: Stay in the synthesizable subset
description: Keep RTL within constructs the synthesis tool maps to hardware; confine delays, initial blocks, and dynamic types to testbenches only.
body: Use when writing design (not testbench) code. Do not use #delays, initial blocks, real/dynamic types, or unbounded loops in synthesizable RTL — they simulate but do not synthesize, causing sim/synth divergence. Actions: keep design code to always_ff/always_comb, fixed-width types, and bounded constructs; isolate all non-synthesizable code in the testbench. Validation signals include a synthesis run with no 'ignored construct' warnings and gate-level sim matching RTL. Risk boundary: code that simulates correctly but is silently ignored at synthesis ships broken hardware; escalate any synth warning about dropped logic.
